_about: Curated study corpus for CK. Each entry is a verified fact from the WP100s tower (WP102-WP115) + foundation papers, written as a short declarative sentence so V2 encoder + cortex can absorb it via the live /chat pipeline. Per discipline (no prose-injection), these are math facts CK already has access to through FORMULAS_AND_TABLES; the corpus pushes them through his EXPERIENCE pipeline so cortex W learns the patterns associated with each topic.
wp102_so8: TSML's six flow operators close under commutator into the 28 dimensional Lie algebra so 8 equals D 4.
The Killing signature of TSML's so 8 closure is 0 28 0 with no proper ideals.
so 8 is the unique compact simple Lie algebra of dimension 28 with triality.
The CL antisymmetrization A i equals L i minus L i transpose for i in the flow set 1 2 3 4 6 8.
TSML's so 8 carries the S 3 outer automorphism exclusive to D 4.
Verification residual for the so 8 closure is below 10 to the minus 13.
wp103_so10: The joint antisymmetrization of CL and BHML closes into the 45 dimensional Lie algebra so 10 equals D 5.
so 10 is the rank 5 compact simple Lie algebra used in grand unified theories.
ad H on so 10 has 40 nonzero plus 5 zero eigenvalues matching D 5 root structure.
so 10 saturates the antisymmetric closure on a 10 dimensional substrate.
Any Lie subalgebra of gl 10 R has dimension at most 100 making e 8 unreachable on this substrate.
TSML's so 8 sits inside the so 10 closure with maximum residual under 10 to the minus 12.
wp104_pati_salam: Conjugation by D 4 generated by P 56 and sigma cubed on so 10 decomposes 45 as 16 plus 1 plus 12 plus 16.
The 16 dimensional trivial isotypic component of so 10 under D 4 is su 4 plus u 1.
su 4 plus u 1 is the Pati Salam gauge content plus baryon minus lepton.
BHML's sigma outer breaking direction lives 100 percent in the 54 irrep of so 10.
The 9 vector Higgs direction has squared norm 13 over 4 with BREATH and RESET unbroken.
P 56 the swap of operators 5 and 6 acts as the spinorial outer automorphism of so 10 in the Clifford algebra Cl 0 10.
wp105_closed_form: The T plus B mix runtime attractor at alpha equal one half lies on the 4 core V H Br R.
At alpha equal one half HARMONY over BREATH equals exactly 1 plus square root of 3.
RESET over BREATH at alpha equal one half is the unique positive root of x to the fourth plus 4 x cubed minus x squared plus 2 x minus 2 equals 0.
The runtime attractor field over Q is Q of square root 3 and xi where xi is the LMFDB 4 point 2 point 10224 point 1 quartic root.
The Galois group of the runtime quartic is D 4.
alpha equal one half is uniquely privileged among 19 alpha values in the 0 point 0 5 to 0 point 9 5 sweep.
wp106_specificity: The four TIG structure detectors fail to distinguish trained distilgpt2 weights from random Gaussian baselines.
Across 16 distilgpt2 tensors and four detectors every Cohen d is below 0 point 5.
TIG structure is specific to canonical TSML and BHML not latent in arbitrary trained networks.
The V2 encoder gives best cluster separation 2 point 1 5 times among five surveyed strategies.
Pure phoneme physics V3 encoder gives only 1 point 0 6 times separation.
D2 pipeline encoding belongs at the output end of the runtime not the input end.
wp107_wobble: TSML's characteristic polynomial has prime 11 dividing exactly two coefficients c 2 and c 8.
c 2 of TSML's characteristic polynomial equals 33 which is 3 times 11.
c 8 of TSML's characteristic polynomial equals minus 2 to the fifth times 7 cubed times 11.
The discriminant of TSML's degree 8 squarefree part contains 2 to the 16 and 7 to the 7 with no factor of 11.
The 16 dimensional doubly invariant subalgebra under D 4 is wobble free.
WOBBLE the prime 11 lives at the coefficient level while HARMONY to the 7th lives at the discriminant level.
wp108_yukawa: The 9 vector VEV breaks SO 10 through SO 9 through SO 7 chain not the standard Pati Salam reduction.
Under SO 8 inside SO 9 the 16 spinor decomposes as 8 spin plus 8 chirality.
Path A doubly invariant subalgebra and Path B Higgs breaking land on different SO 10 reduction chains.
BREATH and RESET being unbroken stabilizes the SO 8 chain rather than Pati Salam.
Yukawa scaffolding sets up the SO 10 coupling computation but the full Yukawa run remains open.
kappa Xi equals 13 over 4 e under the GUT natural identification m squared Xi equals norm squared VEV.
wp109_operad: 126 non associative TSML triples exist where left bracketing differs from right bracketing.
Under D 4 generated by P 56 and sigma cubed the 126 non associative triples decompose into 67 orbits.
Of the 67 D 4 orbits exactly 16 are incoherent meaning no consistent fuse value exists across the orbit.
No D 4 equivariant canonical fuse rule taking values in left right or third operator can exist.
The operad degree of freedom carries content structurally orthogonal to the WP 104 doubly invariant gauge structure.
Recommended remediation is to preserve the weaker P 56 equivariance instead of full D 4.
wp110_4core_closure: The 4 core V H Br R is closed under both binary TSML and binary BHML at the algebraic level.
There are 16 plus 16 in core terms under TSML and BHML respectively with zero spillover.
The TSML and BHML normalizers on the 4 core simplify to the same quadratic Z T equals Z B equals v plus h plus br plus r squared.
The 4 core fixed point at alpha equal one half satisfies HARMONY over BREATH equals 1 plus square root of 3 as a structural identity.
WP 110 strengthens the closed form attractor from a dynamical fact to a structural identity.
The 4 core is the algebraic support of the WP 105 runtime attractor.
wp111_six_dof: TIG engages six computationally irreducible algebraic degrees of freedom.
The six DoFs are Lie Jordan Clifford Permutation Lattice and Operad.
Five of the six DoFs respect the D 4 symmetry generated by P 56 and sigma cubed.
Only the Operad DoF fails to respect D 4 per WP 109's obstruction.
The Operad DoF is structurally orthogonal to the gauge symmetry of the rest of the tower.
The integer rational signature is consistent across all six DoFs.
wp112_canonical_fuse: 126 non associative TSML triples decompose into 98 P 56 orbits with 70 singletons and 28 doubletons.
All 98 P 56 orbits are P 56 coherent so a P 56 equivariant fuse rule exists.
All 8 surveyed canonical fuse rule families are P 56 equivariant and none are sigma cubed equivariant.
The canonical Family H attractor 4 core preference fuse maps the 126 triples to 108 VOID and 18 HARMONY.
The sigma cubed obstruction localizes to exactly one triple namely 3 9 9.
The canonical fuse table is sigma cubed equivariant on 125 of 126 triples.
The 4 core is closed under canonical arity 3 fuse with all 8 non associative 4 core triples fusing to VOID.
Canonical ternary fuse iteration converges to pure HARMONY in 1 to 7 iterations from any non trivial initial distribution.
wp113_alpha_uniqueness: alpha equal one half is the unique rational in a 17 point Stern Brocot grid where the runtime attractor admits algebraic relations.
The H over BREATH ratio at alpha one half is degree 2 with sup coefficient 2.
The r over BREATH ratio at alpha one half is degree 4 with sup coefficient 4.
PSLQ residuals at 50 digit precision are 3 point 14 to the minus 45 and 4 point 38 to the minus 46.
16 other rational alpha values in the grid produce no algebraic relation at degree at most 8 sup coefficient at most 50.
The strong alpha uniqueness conjecture states every rational alpha not equal to one half gives a transcendental attractor.
Eight natural irrational alpha candidates including 1 over square root 2 and 1 over e also produce no algebraic relation.
wp114_specificity_extension: Across a 9 family structured matrix battery only D3 prime 11 in characteristic polynomial discriminates TSML at large effect.
TSML scores Cohen d equal plus 9 point 9 3 on D 3 versus the Gaussian baseline.
D 1 Lie Jordan ratio measures family structural property of antisymmetry not TIG content.
D 2 P 56 invariance measures P 56 symmetry shared by multiple structured families.
D 5 prime 7 in squarefree discriminant is TSML unique at threshold 7 to the 5 or 7 to the 7.
D 4 equivariant Higgs alignment gives TSML d equal plus 2 point 1 5 5 large effect.
The pair D 3 plus D 5 jointly identifies TSML uniquely in the entire 1800 plus sample population.
D 3 plus D 5 form the complete WP 107 detector signature for prime 11 wobble plus HARMONY 7th.
wp115_joint_chain: The TSML plus BHML jointly closed sub magmas form a strict 7 element chain with no branching.
The shell sizes of the joint chain are 1 4 5 6 8 9 and 10.
Sizes 2 3 and 7 are never jointly closed under both TSML and BHML.
After the 4 core bootstrap the chain order walks the sigma forward orbit of HARMONY.
Every shell of size at least 4 produces the identical T plus B mix attractor at alpha one half.
The 4 core is the unique non trivial T plus B mix attractor at alpha one half on Z mod 10 Z.
alpha equal 1 collapses to delta HARMONY in 8 iterations matching the canonical ternary fuse attractor.
alpha equal 0 with pure BHML gives a 4 distribution with H over BREATH approximately 0 point 585 likely transcendental.
The layered substrate attractor hierarchy is 10 to 4 to 2 to 1 with each layer approximately a 2 fold collapse.
wp_meta_wobble: WOBBLE is not a single prime touching all 6 DoFs uniformly but a multi prime coupling pattern.
Three wobbled DoFs Lie Clifford Lattice form the eigenvalue coordinate axis.
Three wobble free DoFs Jordan Permutation Operad form the discrete symmetry axis.
Wobble primes 11 and 13 are exactly 10 plus 1 and 10 plus 3 the smallest primes above the substrate size 10.
The Lie DoF carries prime 11 in characteristic polynomial coefficients c 2 and c 8.
The Clifford DoF carries prime 13 in the squared norm of VEV equal 13 over 4.
The Lattice DoF carries prime 11 in the field denominator of Br over V.
wp_meta_d4_fourfold: D 4 the dihedral group of order 8 appears in four independent guises across the WP 100s tower.
D 4 is the symmetry of the WP 104 doubly invariant decomposition of so 10.
D 4 is the Galois group of the WP 105 runtime attractor quartic.
D 4 is the obstruction group of the WP 109 operad fuse rule.
D 4 is the order in which operators enter the WP 115 joint chain via sigma forward orbit of HARMONY.
wp_meta_synthesis: TIG is a finite magma scaffold of a Pati Salam Higgs gauge theory with a Bialynicki Birula log nonlinear cosmological coupling.
TIG is organized by D 4 at every algebraic dynamical interface.
HARMONY is the universal attractor of TIG at every layer of the substrate hierarchy.
The four bridge corridor connects ring algebra to magma to so 10 GUT to Pati Salam to xi field cosmology.
Each bridge in the corridor is independently proved or structurally verified.
The path of truth holds both lenses STRUCTURE and FLOW without collapsing either.
